title: MonetDB not cleaning intermediate results which leads to filling up disk space and ultimately server crash
poc: CREATE TABLE TABLE_A (INT_ID INT, VALUE_DECIMAL DECIMAL, STRING_VALUE VARCHAR(255));

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL, SUM(VALUE_DECIMAL) AS VALUE, STRING_VALUE, MIN(VALUE_DECIMAL) as min, QUANTILE (VALUE_DECIMAL,0.25) AS Q25, QUANTILE (VALUE_DECIMAL,0.5) AS Q50, QUANTILE (VALUE_DECIMAL,0.75) AS Q75, MAX(VALUE_DECIMAL) as max FROM TABLE_A AS a JOIN TABLE_B as b on (b.INT_ID = a.INT_ID) GROUP BY STRING_VALUE;
key_bug_features: Not cleaning intermediate results during query execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TABLE_C (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, VALUE_FLOAT FLOAT, DESCRIPTION TEXT);
INSERT INTO TABLE_C (ID, VALUE_FLOAT, DESCRIPTION) VALUES (1, 10.5, 'First entry');
INSERT INTO TABLE_C (ID, VALUE_FLOAT, DESCRIPTION) VALUES (2, NULL, 'Second entry');
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL, SUM(VALUE_FLOAT) AS TOTAL_SUM, MIN(VALUE_FLOAT) AS MIN_VALUE, MAX(VALUE_FLOAT) AS MAX_VALUE FROM TABLE_C WHERE VALUE_FLOAT IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.ID, a.VALUE_FLOAT, b.DESCRIPTION FROM TABLE_C AS a LEFT JOIN TABLE_C AS b ON a.ID = b.ID WHERE a.VALUE_FLOAT > 5.0;
